news.headline: Beneficient will present at the Emerging Growth Conference on Dec 4, 2024 with a webcast group presentation.
news.summary: Beneficient has received an invitation to participate in the Emerging Growth Conference scheduled for Wednesday, December 4, 2024. During the event, the Company will conduct a webcast group presentation for potential investors and interested parties.

news.headline: Hapbee introduces a new Smart Sleep Pad to tackle the global sleep crisis, providing personalized solutions to improve health.
news.summary: Hapbee Technologies, Inc. has introduced a new digital wellness solution aimed at addressing the worldwide sleep crisis. The company, a pioneer in this field, launched the Smart Sleep Pad along with a Sleep Membership package in response to growing concerns over the significance of quality sleep for general well-being. By offering a personalized and adaptable product, Hapbee aims to provide a practical and non-invasive remedy for various sleep issues. The Smart Sleep Pad serves as the company's primary digital wellness offering, emphasizing accessibility and effectiveness. This initiative is backed by positive customer input and an increasing body of research underlining the profound influence of sleep on holistic health. Hapbee has disclosed this development without specifying the source.

news.headline: BioAdaptives, Inc. approved a one-for-one stock dividend for common stockholders owning shares on the Record Date.
news.summary: On December 3, 2024, in Las Vegas, it was announced that BioAdaptives Inc. (OTC: BDPT) has approved a dividend for all common stockholders. The dividend will consist of matching shares corresponding to the number of shares owned by each stockholder on the designated Record Date.

news.headline: Winners of VicOne and Block Harbor Capture the Flag Competition, Robbe Derks and Greg Hogan honored at Auto-ISAC Cybersecurity Summit in Detroit.
news.summary: VicOne and Block Harbor revealed the winners of the 2024 Automotive Capture the Flag (CTF) competition as Robbe Derks from Belgium and Greg Hogan from the United States. The announcement was made during an awards ceremony on October 23 at the Auto-ISAC Cybersecurity Summit in Detroit. VicOne, a leader in automotive cybersecurity solutions, is based in Detroit, while Block Harbor, a respected automotive cybersecurity engineering firm, is located in Tokyo. The competition showcased talents in cybersecurity, with participants from various countries competing. The event attracted significant attention within the industry, with representatives from leading automotive companies in attendance.

news.headline: SkinCeuticals unveils exclusive holiday kits in 2024, offering advanced skincare solutions. #1 Medical Aesthetic Skincare Brand.
news.summary: SkinCeuticals is introducing a range of holiday gifts as the year wraps up, catered for gifting, self-care, and enhancing skincare routines with advanced solutions. In New York on December 3rd, 2024, SkinCeuticals, renowned as the top Medical Aesthetic Skincare Brand, is marking the festive season.

news.headline: Think Bold Festival 2025 in Jacksonville on April 11-12 promotes innovation and entrepreneurship. #ThinkBoldFestival
news.summary: A prominent organization, Think Bold, known for championing innovation and entrepreneurship, is excited to unveil the upcoming Think Bold Festival & Conference. The event is set to take place on April 11-12, 2025, at the prestigious Hyatt Regency Jacksonville in Florida.

news.headline: Dutchie dispensaries saw significant sales on Green Wednesday, with millions of transactions processed on November 27, 2024. 6,500 legal cannabis dispensaries were supported.
news.summary: On November 27, 2024, Dutchie, a top technology platform in the cannabis industry, facilitated millions of transactions for dispensaries on their platform. This day, referred to as Green Wednesday, is renowned as the second most significant sales day annually for the industry, standing just behind 4/20. Dutchie extended its services to more than 6,500 authorized cannabis dispensaries, enabling consumers to easily buy products.

news.headline: Babybel® hosts Holiday Village in 6 cities to offer gift wrapping as adults enjoy Babybel cheese; event in Chicago on Dec 3, 2024.
news.summary: The Babybelves Holiday Village is set to make a stop in six cities across the country offering assistance to busy individuals by providing gift wrapping services while they enjoy Babybel cheese. Taking place in Chicago on December 3, 2024, the event is part of the holiday season initiative by Babybel. The brand aims to engage with its consumers by combining the joy of unwrapping Babybel cheese with the convenience of having presents wrapped. This year's program will engage participants in various cities nationwide.

news.headline: BofA celebrates 20 years of Neighborhood Builders program, training 4,000 leaders at 2,000 US non-profits since 2004.
news.summary: Bank of America's philanthropic program has provided training for over 4,000 leaders from nearly 2,000 US nonprofits since 2004. The program, known as Neighborhood Builders®, is now marking its 20th anniversary. This initiative is recognized as one of the largest and most enduring programs of its kind in the United States.

news.headline: Leaf Home™ appoints Rocco Mango as CEO and Rex Tibbens as Chairman of the Board. Effective from Dec. 3, 2024.
news.summary: In Hudson, Ohio, on December 3, 2024, Leaf Home™, a prominent direct-to-consumer provider of home improvement products, revealed that Rocco Mango has been appointed as the new Chief Executive Officer by the company's Board. Mango, a seasoned executive, brings valuable expertise to the role.

news.headline: BigID introduces Data Activity Monitoring to enhance data security, the first DSPM provider to offer near real-time monitoring.- Date: Dec 3, 2024- Company: BigID- Key feature: Data Activity Monitoring- Focus: Data security, privacy, compliance, AI data management.
news.summary: Leading data security, privacy, compliance, and AI data management company BigID unveiled their latest offering, Data Activity Monitoring, on December 3, 2024. In a first for the industry, this service provides near real-time monitoring capabilities. BigID is recognized as the sole provider of Data Security Posture Management (DSPM) to introduce such a feature.

news.headline: Meals on Wheels launches pilot program with Caesars Foundation, reducing senior disconnectedness with friendly calls and visits.
news.summary: A new pilot program, made possible by the Caesars Foundation, has been initiated to show the effectiveness of friendly calling and visiting in lessening isolation among senior citizens. Starting in Arlington, Virginia, on December 3, 2024, this program is backed by Meals on Wheels America, the prominent group aiding over [insert number] seniors nationwide. The initiative aims to tackle the growing issue of disconnectedness among the elderly by providing social interaction and support.

news.headline: RVshare predicts travel behavior in 2025 will focus on quality experiences and passion-driven trips.
news.summary: RVshare predicts that by 2025, travel trends will focus more on enjoying experiences rather than checking off items on a list. The forecast, originating from AUSTIN, Texas and AKRON, Ohio on Dec. 3, 2024, suggests that travelers will be driven by their interests and hobbies, conscious spending habits, and a strong preference for top-notch experiences.

news.headline: St. Charles Consulting Group releases audiobook "The Talent-Fueled Enterprise" on Dec. 3, 2024. Leader in strategic consulting for Fortune 1000 organizations.
news.summary: In St. Charles, Illinois, on December 3, 2024, the St. Charles Consulting Group, a prominent strategic consulting firm for Fortune 1000 companies, revealed the launch of the audiobook version of the highly praised book "The Talent-Fueled Enterprise, A Powerful Approach to Build Tomorrow's Workforce." This book has garnered significant recognition and is aimed at assisting organizations in shaping a robust workforce for the future.

news.headline: Alan AI launches Agent-Generated Dynamic UI for Enterprise AI interactions. Introduces interactive workflow solution in Sunnyvale, Calif on Dec 3, 2024.
news.summary: Alan AI has launched a new AI-driven workflow solution that includes interactive graphs, charts, and forms, aimed at enhancing the user experience for enterprises. The technology was introduced on December 3, 2024, in Sunnyvale, California. Alan AI, known for its AI-driven enterprise solutions, has developed this innovative platform to revolutionize the way businesses operate. With this new advancement, companies can expect to experience a significant boost in productivity and efficiency.

news.headline: Oshi Health included in CB Insights 2024 Digital Health 50 list for innovative GI care, offers immediate access to experts.
news.summary: Oshi Health has recently secured a position for its cutting-edge hybrid care approach, offering patients prompt access to top-tier multidisciplinary digestive health specialists. The company, based in New York, announced this achievement on December 3, 2024. As the leading virtual gastrointestinal (GI) Center of Excellence in the country, Oshi Health stands out for its innovative model.

news.headline: Defense contractor J12 Solutions invests in Unanet ERP GovCon for growth and efficiency. DULLES, VA, Dec. 3, 2024.
news.summary: A rapidly expanding business has made a strategic investment in Unanet, a top-tier provider of project-based enterprise resource planning (ERP) and customer relationship management (CRM) software. The company's move, announced on Dec. 3, 2024 in Dulles, Virginia, aims to leverage Unanet's solutions to gain real-time insights and enhance the efficiency of its business operations. This partnership signifies a significant step towards optimizing processes and driving growth.

news.headline: BuzzRx relaunches BeeKind Giving Program on December 3, 2024, aiming to promote healthier communities by providing free prescription savings to users across the country.
news.summary: Dedicated to promoting well-being in communities across the country, a company based in FORT LAUDERDALE, Fla., announced on Dec. 3, 2024, its participation in "Giving Tuesday." BuzzRx, a service offering free prescription savings, enables individuals to quickly locate the most affordable prices for their medications at pharmacies throughout the nation.

news.headline: "Good Life Companies ranked on Forbes list of Top RIA Firms, celebrating success for the second year."
news.summary: Philadelphia, December 3, 2024 - Good Life Companies (Good Life), a prominent registered investment advisor (RIA) firm and supporter of independent financial advisors, disclosed their placement on Forbes' list of America's Top RIA Firms for the second time. The company is recognized for its dedication to entrepreneurs and financial advisors across the country.

news.headline: Evolve Telemedicine in Mich. launches new patient portal for virtual healthcare, offering hormone and peptide treatments.
news.summary: Evolve Telemedicine is revolutionizing telehealth in the United States, based in Bloomfield Hills, Michigan. The organization is dedicated to enhancing the well-being of individuals by offering bioidentical hormone and peptide treatments. On December 3, 2024, they made an announcement about their latest contributions to advancing the field of telemedicine.

news.headline: Arbor Realty Trust's commercial primary servicer rating upgraded by Fitch Ratings, special servicer rating affirmed, positive outlook maintained.
news.summary: In an announcement on December 3, 2024, global credit rating agency Fitch Ratings enhanced the commercial primary servicer rating of Arbor Realty Trust (NYSE: ABR), while confirming its special servicer rating and upholding a positive rating outlook. The commercial primary servicer rating for Arbor was...

news.headline: Ted Davies, Managing Partner of Attain Capital, is honored in NVTC Tech 100 list in 2024 for driving innovation and growth.
news.summary: A prominent company in the Greater Washington region, Attain Capital, has been acknowledged for its role in spearheading innovation and fostering development. Based in McLean, Virginia, on December 3, 2024, the private equity firm specializes in backing enterprises that offer high-quality, technology-driven offerings. This recognition underscores the firm's commitment to driving advancements and growth in the region.

news.headline: New holiday National SISMAS Day on December 14 celebrates sisterhood and friendship, created by Simone I. Smith.
news.summary: A recently established holiday, National SISMAS Day, has been officially recognized, aiming to unite women in celebrating sisterhood, unity, and the festive spirit. Founded by Simone I. Smith, renowned as the Queen of Hoop Earrings and spouse of a prominent figure, this holiday holds significance for many. Set in motion on December 3, 2024, in New York, this day marks a joyous occasion for women, emphasizing camaraderie and togetherness. It serves as a platform to honor and cherish the bonds shared among women, garnering attention and participation on a national scale.

news.headline: Famous Toastery partners with Feeding the Carolinas for holiday campaign, guests can donate $1, $3, or $5 at checkout in December.
news.summary: A popular brunch franchise is enhancing its fundraising efforts this holiday season by encouraging volunteer work at a local food bank. Customers dining at Famous Toastery have the option to donate $1, $3, or $5 during December. In addition to this initiative, employees will be contributing their time by serving at the food bank during the month.

news.headline: Aureon offers scholarships for 2025, supporting Iowa students in STEM/technology. Expanded awards available.
news.summary: In West Des Moines, Iowa, Aureon has announced the opening of scholarship applications for 2025, with a focus on supporting Iowa students who are pursuing degrees in STEM (science, technology, engineering, and mathematics) and technology fields. The scholarships will offer expanded awards to aid these students in their academic endeavors.

news.headline: Veeam launches new enterprise capabilities in Veeam Data Platform v12.3, including Microsoft Entra ID Protection and Nutanix AHV protection with Gen AI reporting.
news.summary: In Seattle, Veeam has recently announced the launch of advanced cyber resilience tools with enhanced reporting capabilities utilizing Gen AI technology. The update includes full protection for Nutanix AHV systems and introduces access to the Veeam Data Cloud Vault. This new release aims to strengthen data protection measures and ensure the safety of critical information.

news.headline: Walmart finalizes acquisition of VIZIO, paving way for new customer shopping experiences.
news.summary: In Bentonville, Arkansas, Walmart has officially finalized its acquisition of VIZIO. This acquisition comes after the waiting period under federal regulations has ended. With the purchase of VIZIO and its SmartCast Operating System, Walmart aims to innovate customer experiences and provide unique shopping journeys. Additionally, this move will introduce fresh opportunities for advertisers to engage with customers on a large scale and increase product visibility.

news.headline: Builtfirst Technologies partners with Included.co and Hector Kolonas to launch Coworking Edition, providing perks to coworking spaces globally.
news.summary: In a recent announcement, Builtfirst Technologies, a leading partner marketplace platform, revealed a significant partnership with Hector Kolonas and Included.co to introduce the Coworking Edition of Builtfirst. This strategic collaboration aims to provide coworking spaces across the globe with an innovative solution to augment their offerings. Through this alliance, coworking spaces can improve their value proposition, boost members' return on investment, and enrich their overall member experience by granting access to exclusive benefits and collaborations. This initiative is set to revolutionize the coworking industry and has garnered excitement within the community.

news.headline: Ballogy integrates AI-powered Computer Vision technology to enhance athlete development in app, Austin based.
news.summary: Ballogy, a company based in Austin, Texas, has introduced its latest innovation featuring AI-powered Computer Vision technology in the Ballogy mobile application.

news.headline: Swisslog Healthcare features advanced pharmacy automation at ASHP Exhibition from Dec 8-12, 2024 in New Orleans.
news.summary: Swisslog Healthcare, a renowned provider of pharmacy and transport automation solutions, will be showcasing their cutting-edge technologies at the American Society of Health-System Pharmacists (ASHP) Midyear Clinical Meeting & Exhibition. The exhibition will take place from December 8 to 12, 2024, at the Ernest N. Morial Convention Center in New Orleans, LA. Those interested can visit booth #318 at the event to discover Swisslog Healthcare's latest innovations in pharmacy automation.

news.headline: Amazon reports highest sales ever during Thanksgiving week, setting a new record for items sold.

Chess and finance conference at FIDE World Rapid & Blitz Chess Championship in NYC includes Wall Street Gambit on Dec 29 at Cipriani 55 Wall Street. Play blitz against Magnus Carlsen, Viswanathan Anand, and Fabiano Caruana.
news.summary: In New York, the 2024 FIDE World Rapid & Blitz Championships is set to enhance the integration of chess and finance through the launch of Wall Street Gambit. This innovative event, scheduled for Sunday, December 29 at Cipriani 55 Wall Street, will include a chess and finance conference. Participants will have the rare chance to engage in blitz games against renowned players such as Magnus Carlsen, Viswanathan Anand, and Fabiano Caruana. The conference will feature esteemed keynote speakers and promises to be a unique experience for attendees.

news.headline: Lithium-Ion Battery Market to reach $55.22 billion by 2032 with a 13.80% CAGR between 2024-2032 led by Europe's push for carbon neutrality.
news.summary: A report on the lithium-ion battery market projects that it will reach a value of US$55.22 billion by 2032, seeing a steady Compound Annual Growth Rate of 13.80% between 2024 and 2032. This growth is attributed to rising demand for electric vehicles and renewable energy storage. The report covers various aspects such as components, product types, applications, countries, and company analysis.

news.headline: Chosen Foods celebrates Codex Alimentarius Commission setting standards for avocado oil purity; only 2 of 22 brands tested were 100% pure.
news.summary: A leading avocado oil brand, Chosen Foods, known for its 100% pure guarantee, applauds the Codex Alimentarius Commission's move to set new global standards for avocado oil. Recent findings, including a UC Davis study of 22 brands, revealed rampant adulteration in the industry. The study confirmed that only 2 brands, including Chosen Foods, were completely pure. The commission's decision comes as a response to this issue, highlighting the importance of ensuring product authenticity and quality in a market where adulteration is prevalent.

news.headline: Comfort Zone wants singles to consider dating a cat dad, aiming to break stereotypes during cuffing season 2025.
news.summary: A cat calming brand named Comfort Zone based in Walnut Creek, California, is promoting the idea of singles accepting cat dads by breaking down negative stereotypes. The campaign aims to encourage singles to consider cat owners as potential partners, just in time for Cuffing Season of 2025. Comfort Zone wants to change the perception surrounding cat dads and promote a positive image for them in the dating world.

news.headline: Inola High School wins T-Mobile's Friday Night 5G Lights competition out of 1,700 schools across 50 states, getting $2 million prize.
news.summary: In a press release from Bellevue, Washington, T-Mobile (NASDAQ: TMUS) has revealed the winner of its Friday Night 5G Lights competition. Inola High School from Inola, Oklahoma claimed the top spot after competing against over 1,700 high schools nationwide. Votes from fans around the globe ultimately determined the Top 16 finalists, with Inola emerging as the champion. The grand prize awarded to the school is valued at $2 million. This award will allow Inola High School to transform its high school football field into a state-of-the-art venue.

news.headline: Eco-friendly brand Who Gives a Crap donates $3M to build toilets globally, helped 845k people in 2023. Expanding since 2012.
news.summary: A sustainable toilet paper company, Who Gives A Crap, based in Australia and with a U.S. team established in 2016, recently disclosed a noteworthy donation exceeding $3 million. Originating in Australia in 2012, the brand allocates fifty percent of its profits towards endeavors focused on water, sanitation, and hygiene. In 2023, their contributions aided 845,000 individuals globally. The company's core mission is to ensure universal access to clean water and adequate sanitation facilities.

news.headline: Global Mycotoxin Binding Agent Market to reach $524.4 million by 2034, growing at 6.7% CAGR. North America's market share to be 24.3% by 2034.
news.summary: The global Mycotoxin Binding Agent Market is expected to reach US$ 274.1 million in 2024, with a projected growth rate of 6.7% between 2024 and 2034. These agents are increasingly in demand worldwide due to their importance in food safety, animal health, and agriculture. By 2034, the market is estimated to reach US$ 524.4 million, with North America holding a 24.3% share. In East Asia, the market is set to grow by 7%, particularly in Japan with a projected market share of 4% by 2034. Sales in Canada are expected to rise by 7.2% through 2034. These mycotoxin binders play a crucial role in ensuring food safety and health, driven by global trade expansion and stricter regulatory standards. Awareness of mycotoxin risks is increasing, leading to higher demand for these agents in animal feed and food production.

news.headline: Peachtree Group acquires 6th hotel property in St. Augustine with 90-key Home2 Suites by Hilton through a DST.
news.summary: Atlanta-based company Peachtree Group recently added to its portfolio by acquiring its sixth hotel property. This acquisition involved the 90-key Home2 Suites by Hilton St. Augustine I-95 and was structured as a Delaware Statutory Trust.

news.headline: Mensura Capital advises Tri-State Painting, Inc. in sale to Muehlhan Surface Protection, Inc. Terms undisclosed.
news.summary: Atlanta-based Mensura Capital, LLC has disclosed its role in facilitating the acquisition of Tri-State Painting, Inc. by Muehlhan Surface Protection, Inc. The acquisition involves Muehlhan Holding GmbH's US subsidiary, resulting in Tri-State Painting becoming a part of Muehlhan's Industrial Services Group. The agreement allows Tri-State Painting to continue its operations under current management, supported by Muehlhan's resources. Specific financial details of the transaction were not provided.

news.headline: Trex Company partners with Alexandria Moulding to extend reach in Canada, expanding distribution network with premium products.
news.summary: Trex Company, Inc. [NYSE: TREX], known for producing high-performance, wood-alternative decking and railing, has revealed plans to broaden its distribution network in Canada by partnering with Alexandria Moulding. Alexandria Moulding, a prominent manufacturer and distributor of mouldings, millwork, and decorative building products in North America, will help introduce Trex's top-tier decking and railing items to a broader audience. This move signifies Trex's strategic effort to reach more customers and expand its market presence in Canada.

news.headline: Valon Mortgage is now a Ginnie Mae Issuer, adding to its approvals from Fannie Mae, Freddie Mac, FHA, VA, and USDA.
news.summary: Valon Mortgage, based in New York, recently achieved a milestone by receiving approval as a Ginnie Mae Issuer. This signifies a significant advancement for the company, as it had to showcase various qualifications such as organizational, financial, procedural, quality control, and other essential characteristics to participate in the program. Having already obtained approvals from Fannie Mae, Freddie Mac, FHA, VA, and USDA, Valon can now enhance its offerings and broaden its reach. This development opens up new opportunities for Valon Mortgage as it continues its growth trajectory.

news.headline: BioMed Realty hires Bob Nowak, a 30-year real estate veteran, as Senior VP, focusing on West Coast market operations.
news.summary: In San Diego, a significant development has taken place as BioMed Realty strengthens its presence in the West Coast market. The company has appointed Bob Nowak, a seasoned real estate professional with 30 years of experience, as their new Senior Vice President. This strategic move aims to enhance BioMed Realty's operations in the region and capitalize on Nowak's expertise in the industry. With this appointment, BioMed Realty looks to leverage Nowak's knowledge and network to drive growth and success in the dynamic West Coast market.

news.headline: Huron Capital's Sunland Asphalt acquires Metro Pavers, Inc. in Denver; Metro Pavers founded in 1975 as leading asphalt company.
news.summary: In Detroit, the renowned middle-market private equity firm Huron Capital disclosed that its portfolio company, Sunland Asphalt, has successfully acquired Metro Pavers, Inc. The latter, also known as MPI, has been operative since 1975 in the greater Denver region and is recognized as a leading asphalt maintenance and paving entity in the area. Specializing in services like asphalt paving and maintenance, patching, seal coating, concrete, and more, Metro Pavers has solidified its reputation over the years as a top player in the industry.

news.headline: Dune Real Estate Partners and TF Cornerstone form $1B Alta Residential for national office-to-residential conversions.
news.summary: A $1 billion venture named Alta Residential has been established by Dune Real Estate Partners and TF Cornerstone, a NYC-based developer. The collaboration aims to convert office buildings into residential spaces, seizing the generational opportunity presented by the significant distress in the office real estate market and the unmet demand for residential properties. Dune is a prominent national real estate investment platform, while TF Cornerstone specializes in integrated residential and commercial development.

news.headline: Parliament entrance is blocked, lawmakers can't enter - Yonhap.
Mondelēz appoints Volker Kuhn as EVP for Europe, replaces Vinzenz Gruber from April 1, 2025. Kuhn joins on Jan. 6, 2025.
news.summary: Mondelēz International, a leading global snack company listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol MDLZ, has appointed Volker Kuhn as the new Executive Vice President and President of Europe. This change is set to take effect on April 1, 2025, with Kuhn reporting directly to the Chair and CEO, Dirk Van de Put. Kuhn will be taking over from Vinzenz Gruber, who is retiring from the company on the same date. To facilitate a seamless handover, Kuhn will officially join Mondelēz on January 6, 2025, working closely with Gruber during this transitional period.

news.headline: Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong opposes US gov selling Bitcoin after 19,800 BTC transferred to Coinbase Prime, valued at $1.9B.
news.summary: Coinbase's CEO, Brian Armstrong, strongly opposes the U.S. government's decision to sell its Bitcoin holdings, in line with growing criticism over the government's handling of large amounts of the cryptocurrency. The debate escalated after a transfer of 19,800 bitcoin, worth $1.9 billion, to a Coinbase Prime deposit address on Dec. 2. U.S. Space Force major Jason Lowery also criticized the move, stating that it is a "huge strategic mistake" and emphasizing that there is no price at which it would be sensible for the U.S. to sell its Bitcoin reserves. Armstrong supported Lowery's stance, emphasizing that the U.S. government should refrain from selling any of its Bitcoin holdings.

news.headline: Exelon Corp appoints Colette Honorable as new Chief Legal Officer and Corporate Secretary, Gayle Littleton stepping down.
news.summary: Exelon Corp. (Nasdaq: EXC) based in Chicago disclosed plans to reorganize executive leadership by confirming the resignation of Gayle Littleton as Executive Vice President, Chief Legal Officer, and Corporate Secretary effective from Jan. 1. Littleton will transition into the position of Special Advisor to the CEO until March 31. Colette Honorable will take over the Legal Department in an enhanced capacity, being appointed as Chief Legal Officer and Corporate Secretary. Honorable currently serves as Execu...

news.headline: Pioneer Power (Nasdaq: PPSI) to pilot project with Fortune 100 e-commerce retailer addressing power needs of EV fleet.
news.summary: A company known as Pioneer Power Solutions, Inc. (Nasdaq: PPSI) headquartered in Fort Lee, N.J., and specializing in distributed energy resources, power generation equipment, and mobile EV charging solutions, has introduced a pioneering pilot program in collaboration with a major Fortune 100 e-commerce corporation. This initiative aims to address the "grid gap" issue arising from the escalating power demands of the retailer's electric delivery fleet. By merging expertise in the development, manufacturing, servicing, and integration of various energy solutions, Pioneer is working towards providing a sustainable resolution. This novel program marks a significant step forward in the efforts to bridge the disparity between power requirements and available resources in the context of electric fleet operations.
